page_metadata.biotools__summary: Tool for visualization of microbial genomes. Chromosome wheels and linear genome maps with user specified features/color coding can be generated interactively. Graphics are created in SVG format.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Tool for visualization of microbial genomes. Chromosome wheels and linear genome maps with user specified features/color coding can be generated interactively. Graphics are created in SVG format.
